title: Isolate the trigonometric function
text: Begin by isolating the sine function on one side of the equation.

title: Solve for sin(3θ)
text: What is the value of sin(3θ) after isolating it?

title: Find general solutions for the angle
text: Let u $$=$$ 3θ. Find all general solutions for u where sin(u) $$=$$ $$\frac{1}{2}$$. Remember to include the periodicity.

title: Solve for θ and apply interval
text: Substitute u $$=$$ 3θ back into your general solutions and solve for θ. Then, find all solutions that fall within the interval 0\leqθ<2pi.

title: Determine number of solutions
text: Since the period of sin(3θ) is $$\frac{2\pi}{3}$$, how many full cycles of 3θ are covered in the interval (0, 2pi) for θ? This will tell you how many solutions to expect.
